domain: Multi-platform B2B SaaS subscription billing. A growth-stage developer tools company (NovaDev) that uses 20 billing platforms across different customer segments, geographies, and payment methods. Core product: API monitoring SaaS with starter ($29/mo), pro ($99/mo), and enterprise ($299/mo) tiers. Internal Postgres database is the source of truth for customer identity and links to each billing platform via billing_platform + external_id.

personas.name: growing-startup
personas.description: NovaDev — a growth-stage B2B SaaS company with ~50 customers in the internal Postgres database across 3 plans (starter $29/mo, pro $99/mo, enterprise $299/mo). Customers are spread across 20 billing platforms by region and payment method: Stripe (US/EU cards), Chargebee (enterprise contracts), Paddle (EU with VAT), Braintree (PayPal-heavy customers), Adyen (global enterprise), Checkout.com (UK merchants), dLocal (LATAM), Flutterwave (Africa), GoCardless (UK direct debit), LemonSqueezy (indie developers), MercadoPago (LATAM local payments), Mollie (EU/Netherlands), PayPal (worldwide fallback), Razorpay (India), Recurly (legacy subscribers), RevenueCat (mobile app), Square (in-person), Xendit (Southeast Asia), Zuora (usage-based enterprise), Klarna (buy-now-pay-later). Each customer in the Postgres customers table has billing_platform + external_id linking to their billing platform. Mix of monthly and annual billing, some overdue invoices, a few disputed charges, recent upgrades. 6 months of history.
